summary: Tested HR features iteration 151: Employee break_start/break_end fields, 12-hour time format with Arabic AM/PM (ص/م), auto-refresh every 60 seconds, BiometricDevices onDataRefresh callback, and receipt net cash +/-/✅ indicators. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verified all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: EmployeeCreate model (line 1403-1404) includes break_start and break_end fields
VERIFIED: EmployeeUpdate model (line 1450-1451) includes break_start and break_end fields
VERIFIED: EmployeeResponse model (line 1425-1426) includes break_start and break_end fields
VERIFIED: Auto-process attendance (line 14255-14260) deducts break time from worked_hours
VERIFIED: HR.js TimePickerAmPm component (line 71-122) with 12-hour format and ص/م options
VERIFIED: HR.js attendance display (line 1843-1851) uses formatTime12 with Arabic AM/PM
VERIFIED: HR.js auto-refresh (line 232-238) with setInterval every 60 seconds
VERIFIED: HR.js passes onDataRefresh={fetchData} to BiometricDevices (line 2283)
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js accepts onDataRefresh prop (line 33) and calls it on sync (line 128)
VERIFIED: Dashboard.js printClosingReceipt (line 1151-1156) shows +/-/✅ indicators for net cash
seed_data_creation: Test employee with break fields created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All HR features verified: 1) Employee form has break_start/break_end fields with 12-hour AM/PM picker (ص/م). 2) Attendance times display in 12-hour format with Arabic AM/PM. 3) Auto-refresh every 60 seconds via setInterval. 4) BiometricDevices calls onDataRefresh on sync. 5) Receipt net cash shows +/-/✅ indicators. ZKTeco device is MOCKED (localhost:9999 agent not available).

verified_features.feature: Attendance times display in 12-hour format with ص/م (AM/PM)
verified_features.details: Attendance tab shows times like '9:00 ص' (9:00 AM) and '4:30 م' (4:30 PM)

verified_features.feature: Employee edit form has break_start and break_end fields
verified_features.details: Add employee dialog shows 'بداية الاستراحة' and 'نهاية الاستراحة' fields with data-testid attributes

verified_features.feature: Employee edit form shift/break times use 12-hour AM/PM picker
verified_features.details: TimePickerAmPm component with dropdown selects for hours, minutes, and AM/PM (ص/م)
Created employee with break_start=12:00, break_end=13:00 successfully
Updated employee break times to 13:00-14:00 successfully

verified_features.feature: GET /api/employees returns break_start and break_end fields
verified_features.details: EmployeeResponse model includes break_start and break_end fields
HR.js line 234-236: setInterval(() => fetchData(), 60 * 1000) with proper cleanup

verified_features.feature: BiometricDevices component calls onDataRefresh callback on new data
verified_features.details: BiometricDevices.js line 33 accepts prop, line 128 calls onDataRefresh() on sync

verified_features.feature: Receipt net cash shows +/-/✅ indicators based on difference
verified_features.details: Dashboard.js line 1151-1156: ✅ for zero, + for positive (زيادة), - for negative (نقص)

mocked_apis_list: ZKTeco biometric device endpoints (localhost:9999) - requires local Windows agent
